programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: The adventurer meets more people who have turned their backs on the rat-race and set up home in some of the most remote locations on Earth. This week, Ben travels to the vast forests of the Rhodope Mountains in Bulgaria to join Miriam and Peter, a couple who have chosen life as nomads, hiking through some of the world's most striking wildernesses. They are educated but unemployed and homeless - and it's just the way they like it. Having previously walked the length of New Zealand in 2016, Ben now finds the duo on an intrepid journey across South Eastern Europe

programme.title: Get Your Tatts Out: Kavos Ink
programme.desc: Three strip-club workers have a contest to drum up more business, with the loser having a mammary-based reminder of his failure sketched onto his leg. Holiday-maker Nelson has his pals' names inked on his backside, while another comes up with a design representing his favourite body part

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Great Scientists
programme.desc: Allan Chapman explores the life and legacy of Charles Darwin, one of the most controversial scientists of all time, whose theory of random mutation and natural selection caused a storm in Victorian society, setting science and religion on a collision course

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton present highlights of the home improvement series, focusing on making the most of original features and sprucing up gardens to attract potential buyers. Includes another visit to a Grade II-listed house in Stoke-on-Trent

programme.title: Two Thousand Women (1944)
programme.desc: Female prisoners struggle to cope with living in a German internment camp, but find common cause in making life difficult for their captors. When three British airmen are shot down over the prison, they keep them hidden from the Germans while plotting a way to smuggle them out safely. Second World War comedy, with Phyllis Calvert, Flora Robson, Patricia Roc and Renee Houston

programme.title: To Hell and Back (1955)
programme.desc: Biopic of actor Audie Murphy, following his service in the Second World War. Enlisting in the Army as a teenager to support his younger siblings, he excelled himself in action in the conflict in Europe and became one of America's most decorated soldiers. Starring Murphy as himself alongside Marshall Thompson, Charles Drake and Gregg Palmer

programme.title: Night Passage (1957)
programme.desc: The black sheep of a family falls in with a gang of outlaws plotting to rob a train operated by his strait-laced brother, but reckons without his sibling's determination to track him down and set him back on the straight and narrow. Western, starring James Stewart, Audie Murphy, Dan Duryea and Brandon de Wilde

programme.title: Dragoon Wells Massacre (1957)
programme.desc: A cavalry officer is assigned to escort a captured murderer to prison. However, the prisoner and his guard are compelled to join forces to survive when Apache warriors raid their wagon train as it moves across Arizona into hostile territory. Western, starring Barry Sullivan, Dennis O'Keefe, Mona Freeman and Katy Jurado

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II (1988)
programme.desc: The rugged Australian adventurer sets out to save his reporter girlfriend from New York drug dealers. Having rescued her from their clutches, he realises they will soon be coming after him - so he decides to even the odds by luring them to the Outback for a final showdown. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Paul Hogan, Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Charles S Dutton

programme.title: Snatched (2017)
programme.desc: After being dumped by her boyfriend before their holiday, Emily Middleton takes her cautious mother Linda with her to Ecuador. However, their lives are soon turned upside down when the pair are kidnapped. Fish-out-of-water comedy, starring Amy Schumer, Goldie Hawn and Joan Cusack

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter (2015)
programme.desc: A medieval warrior thwarts an evil witch queen's plan to wipe out the human race, but is cursed with immortality as a result. In the modern day, he continues to battle evil, and faces his greatest challenge when the sorceress is resurrected to resume her evil plan. Fantasy adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Elijah Wood, Rose Leslie and Michael Caine

programme.title: Charulata (1964)
programme.desc: A newspaper owner in 19th-century India feels guilty for neglecting his wife to focus on work, so asks his cousin to keep her company. They develop a close friendship over a shared love of poetry, but eventually fall in love with each other. Satyajit Ray's romantic drama, with Madhabi Mukherjee and Soumitra Chatterjee. In Bengali and English

programme.title: Kansas Raiders (1950)
programme.desc: A young Jesse James and his allies join a band of rebels fighting a guerrilla campaign for the Confederates during the American Civil War. The experience gives the future outlaw his first taste of crime, but he grows increasingly disillusioned at the atrocities committed by the leader of the raiders. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Brian Donlevy and Tony Curtis

programme.title: Heaven Knows, Mr Allison (1957)
programme.desc: A US marine corporal stationed on a South Pacific island and a novice nun on a mission are forced into the hills when Japanese forces arrive and set up military bases during the Second World War. Before long the pair develop strong emotional ties, but in resisting their feelings for each other the relationship becomes one of deep mutual respect. Romantic drama, written and directed by John Huston, with Robert Mitchum and Deborah Kerr

programme.title: The Weaker Sex (1948)
programme.desc: A housewife regrets not doing more to help the war effort after the ship her son is serving on is damaged in the D-Day Landings. Drama, starring Ursula Jeans and Thora Hird

programme.title: Gunpoint (1966)
programme.desc: A sheriff tries to stop a train robbery, but is shot by his own treacherous deputy. Recovering from his wounds, he assembles a posse to bring the outlaws to justice, acquiring an uneasy ally in a saloon owner in love with a dancehall singer the fugitives have taken hostage. Western, starring Audie Murphy and Joan Stanley

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: A chain of bizarre and deadly incidents in several countries leads scientists to the conclusion that the Earth's core has stopped spinning. As chaos erupts around the world, experts hatch a plan to halt the destruction and save the human race - but it involves venturing deep below the planet's surface to detonate a nuclear bomb. Sci-fi thriller, starring Aaron Eckhart, Hilary Swank, Stanley Tucci and DJ Qualls

programme.title: The Darkest Minds (2018)
programme.desc: When a mysterious pandemic wipes out most of America's children, those who survive are gifted with superpowers. However, when they are imprisoned by adults who fear everyone under 18, a group of teens form a resistance group to fight back and reclaim control of their future. Dystopian thriller, starring Amandla Stenberg and Mandy Moore

programme.title: The Gunman (2015)
programme.desc: A mercenary goes into hiding after successfully carrying out a hit on an African politician that sparks a series of uprisings and violent acts. He re-emerges years later, only to become the latest target of his former colleagues. Crime drama, starring Sean Penn, Idris Elba, Ray Winstone, Javier Bardem and Mark Rylance

programme.title: Hounds of Love (2016)
programme.desc: When a young woman is abducted by a couple from a suburb of Perth, Australia, her only chance of surviving the terrible ordeal her kidnappers inflict upon her is to drive a wedge between them. Crime thriller, starring Emma Booth, Ashleigh Cummings and Stephen Curry

programme.title: Distant Drums (1951)
programme.desc: An army officer mounts a daring raid through the treacherous Florida swamplands. His mission is to take on a group of marauding Seminole rebels, as well as the gun runners who have been supplying them with weapons, and rescue a group of settlers who have been taken hostage by the tribe. Western, starring Gary Cooper, Mari Aldon, Richard Webb, Ray Teal and Arthur Hunnicutt

programme.title: A Night to Remember (1958)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama recreating the sinking of the Titanic, told from the point of view of the ship's second officer as he struggles to get as many passengers and crew off the vessel before it sinks. Meanwhile, the captain of a nearby vessel embarks on a doomed rescue mission. Starring Kenneth More, Honor Blackman, Ronald Allen, Tucker McGuire and David McCallum

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much (1956)
programme.desc: An American couple on holiday in Morocco witness the killing of a local man they have befriended. Before dying he whispers a secret that has serious political implications - but they are prevented from telling the police when their son is kidnapped by a gang of spies bent on keeping them silent. Alfred Hitchcock's remake of his own 1934 thriller, with James Stewart, Doris Day, Bernard Miles and Daniel Gelin. Featuring Day's performance of Oscar-winning song Whatever Will Be, Will Be (Que Sera, Sera)

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: The war between the shape-shifting robots erupts once again, as the first of the evil Decepticons leads an attack on Earth to locate an ancient planet-destroying machine. Hapless teenager Sam Witwicky is caught in the middle of the ensuing conflict as he holds the key to discovering the location of the device. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox

programme.title: Red Sparrow (2018)
programme.desc: Ballerina Dominika Egorova is recruited to a Russian intelligence service, where she is forced to use her body as a weapon. Her first mission, targeting a CIA agent, threatens to unravel the security of both nations. Spy thriller, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Joel Edgerton and Matthias Schoenaerts

programme.title: Last Action Hero (1993)
programme.desc: A boy watching an action movie is transported into the film by a magic ticket and meets its hero figure, who refuses to believe he is a fictional character. Matters take a turn for the worse when the screen villain gets hold of the ticket and crosses over into the real world - where bad guys can win. Comedy adventure, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Austin O'Brien, Charles Dance, F Murray Abraham and Anthony Quinn

programme.title: Dude, Where's My Car? (2000)
programme.desc: Two friends wake up with the realisation they have absolutely no memory of the events of the night before. They set about retracing their steps - only to stumble across a host of crazy characters, a flock of marauding ostriches and a fanatical alien-worshipping cult. Comedy, starring Seann William Scott, Ashton Kutcher, Jennifer Garner and Kristy Swanson

programme.desc: Stuart hosts a Halloween party at the comic-book store, and Howard talks incessantly about his work on board the International Space Station, annoying his wife and friends. Penny and Leonard have a steamy encounter at the lab. Guest starring real-life astronaut Buzz Aldrin

programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.desc: With Dave Kim's parents out of town for the weekend, Adam decides to throw a giant party to impress Brea. Beverly lets fame go to her head after her cookbook is published

programme.desc: While the squad attends a funeral in Los Angeles, Captain Holt learns that he is in the running for his dream job: Commissioner of the NYPD. however, after they miss their return flight to New York, Peralta must find a way to get Holt back in time for his interview. Santiago tries to convince everyone that she can be laid back, Jeffords panics about losing his first-class flight, and Boyle pries into Diaz's personal life

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz begs Peralta to help her break some big news to her parents, but her plan is thrown off track when Mr and Mrs Diaz wrongly assume that their daughter and her colleague are dating. The squad suffers internet problems after the Cyber Crimes Unit move into the office downstairs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard finds out that he has a half-brother, Sheldon and Amy have a platonic sleepover, and Penny gets an offer to audition for a Kevin Smith film. American comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A day at the roller-skating rink leaves Murray wishing he had not asked Erica to tell him about her life, while Pops steps in to help when a back-to-school shopping trip causes problems between Beverly and Adam. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle organises an elaborate scavenger hunt for Peralta's bachelor party, but the guys take some short cuts that throw the event into disarray. Santiago's bachelorette party goes awry when it comes to light that she once slept with a member of the band that is to play at her wedding reception

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members worry about Diaz when she responds to an active shooter alert, but are instructed to stay back at the precinct building and are powerless to help. Peralta and Boyle try to find ways to assist Diaz, Jeffords has an existential crisis, while Santiago and Gina attempt to repair the broken toilet in the ladies' room

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the middle of a nationwide shortage of liquid helium, Sheldon and Leonard take desperate measures to obtain the supplies they need in order to prove a scientific theory before a rival team of researchers can beat them to it. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While being interviewed for a documentary about Star Trek character Mr Spock, Sheldon struggles to suppress his emotions about his recent break-up with Amy, leaving Leonard and Penny shocked to discover he had bought her an engagement ring. Howard and Bernadette fall out over plans to renovate his childhood home. Wil Wheaton, Adam Nimoy and Stephen Merchant guest star

Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard attempt to distract Sheldon with a trip to a historic railway when he slows the progress of their work on the Air Force guidance system. Raj and Stuart look after baby Halley, while Penny and Amy take Bernadette out

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny agree to participate in an unusual experiment, and Leonard, Amy, Raj and Emily spend the evening trying to escape from a 'zombie'. Elsewhere, Howard and Bernadette run into trouble at the airport after returning from Mrs Wolowitz's funeral. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Trouble arises when Amy learns that Sheldon has applied for a one-way mission to colonise Mars. Meanwhile, Leonard surprises Penny with a gift, and Raj decides to snoop around Emily's flat after she is called back to work during their evening together. programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at the car company's plant in northwest England, as work commences on a new range of 4x4s. This is the first time cameras have had access to the plant, which is currently undergoing millions in new investment. The programme features the local people and master craftsmen working on the factory floor as well as visiting the world's most exclusive car showroom in Mayfair and the secretive department where customers can obtain the latest upgrades to their bespoke vehicle

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Isy Suttie to go up against Jon Richardson and Richard Osman in the comedy words-and-numbers quiz. Alex Horne and the Horne Section join resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An episode focusing on the lengths the staff go to in the line of duty, with patients including 23-year-old Joe, who is rushed to St George's after his cousin accidentally stabbed him in the thigh. Psychiatric nurse Christie, 25, arrives in resus with severe burns after being attacked by a patient, and two-year-old Freddie won't let doctors look in his eye after complaining of pain

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw travel to Devon to steal away one of the fastest road cars of its time, a 1997 Mitsubishi Evo 4, which dominated the World Rally circuits in the 1990s. The car that Fuzz and Tim are taking on belongs to 60-year-old Gary, a petrolhead who loved his Evo and used it as his daily driver

programme.title: Inside Bentley: A Great British Motor Car
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at the car company's plant in northwest England, as work commences on a new range of 4x4s. This is the first time cameras have had access to the plant, which is currently undergoing millions in new investment. The programme features the local people and master craftsmen working on the factory floor as well as visiting the world's most exclusive car showroom in Mayfair and the secretive department where customers can obtain the latest upgrades to their bespoke vehicle

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of the team's favourite investigations, including Kate Quilton's visit to McVitie's in Carlisle to find out why so many biscuits have little holes all over them. Jimmy Doherty heads to Portugal to see how corks are made for wine bottles, while Matt Tebbutt is in Italy to learn why mascarpone is more expensive than other soft cheeses

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Devon County Show, where she discovers the secret of home-made handscrub and learns about beekeeping and making beeswax candles. She also tries her hand at crafting jewellery in silver clay - an ideal way of making unusual but inexpensive gifts

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Emma and David Martin-Jewell from south Wales are looking for a dream holiday home for themselves and their young family in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. Emma has been holidaying in the US since she was a child and has long dreamed of owning a holiday home there. Ben Hillman shows the couple five homes within their £275,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are on the Wirral, where Simon has a plan to turn a chunky chain into a standard lamp and Henry picks up a 1963 Ford Anglia to get it back to its best

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team is near Preston, where Simon O'Brien restores a spotlight he believes may be from a German U-boat while Henry Cole gets creative with an aircraft jump seat

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The detective firm tries to find the relations of a man whose estate could be worth more than £1million, and explores the poignant tale of a Polish princess

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple of ex-pats attempt to run a new fishing charter, two B&B owners in France face their biggest challenge yet, and on the Costa Blanca, a family pulls together to try and rescue a Spanish dream home

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Shoes in Durham, where landlord Billy Gowland and partner Debbie Nelson hope their footwear-themed pub and B&B is the right fit for their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Biggin Hall Hotel in Derbyshire, owner James Moffat and partner Annie Larner hope the B&Bers will fall for the rural charm of their 17th-century farmhouse

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit the group head to Forest Garden Shovelstrode in East Sussex, where hosts Charles and Lisa Hooper hope the guests buy into their woodland retreat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Derby Manor Hotel and Restaurant, where mother-and-son team Fiona and James Milligan opened their doors eight months earlier after a £1million refurbishment. With a red carpet and over 6,000 hand-glued diamante studs on the walls, some of the guests compare the decor to Dubai. They get a taste of life in the fast lane when James lets them take the hotel's fleet of premium hire cars out for a spin. And later, during a remote control car race, there's some unexpected behaviour from one guest. Fiona and James are expecting good feedback, but have to confront the fact that their guests wouldn't all be keen to return

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. The Shoes is up first and hosts Billy Gowland and his partner Debbie Nelson find out if their budget rooms have proved too basic for the group. Next, James Moffat and his partner Annie Larner from Biggin Hall Hotel want to clear up their issues with Billy and Debbie. As the third hosts, Charles and Lisa Hooper from yurt glamp-site Forest Garden Shovelstrode confront their low scores from James. Finally, Fiona and James from the Derby Manor Hotel and Restaurant make accusations of nitpicking and double standards

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: A company is contacted by a man who is trying to track down the rest of his family after his cousin dies, and the beneficiaries of a Roman Catholic priest's will embark on a journey to learn about his remarkable dedication to his Manchester parish. Plus, details of more unclaimed estates

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Young meerkat parents Huskie and Beagle have a new baby, Junior, but keepers have to step in when he falls gravely ill. Meanwhile, red panda Nima, who lost her partner last year, meets a new mate, Koda, but the pair do not get off to the best start, and in the penguin pool, a new male called Flounder arrives

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Angel goes shopping with Stephanie and shows her the best way to frame her father's original artwork using modern and antique fabric. Justin and Annabelle put up their newly renovated exterior chateau shutters, but the numbering seems to have gone a bit haywire, so getting the shutters on the right windows proves a challenge

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Bolton-based bricklayer Paul Rimmer, who has spent his career restoring and renovating Victorian terrace houses, sets his sights on constructing a state-of-the-art home on a budget of £350,000. However, instead of using the construction materials he has spent the past 40 years mastering, he has opted to build his new home from wood. Roping in his wife Carol, daughter Abby and a selection of favoured workmates, Paul and his team begin work on the ultra-modern, five-bedroom build, and Kevin McCloud reveals how extreme weather, exhaustion, and rapidly dwindling funds place the entire project in jeopardy

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton catches up with Graham and Nicky, first featured in 2017, who have finally finished their ambitious contemporary home set in the Devon countryside - six years after starting

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Peter Maddision meets Simon and Lauren, who want to convert a tiny 150-year-old church in Hawkesbury, New South Wales, into their family home. Will they succeed in creating a modern house while honouring the history of the church?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ex-paratrooper Martin, who's 48, has sustained multiple life-changing injuries to his neck, pelvis and legs after his paraglider was blown into a hillside, and is rushed to hospital by emergency helicopter. Meanwhile, doctors treat 73-year-old Eddie for severe sepsis, and 72-year-old Graham, suffering from a constant nose bleed due to the blood-thinners he is taking, is also treated

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr, Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by Bob Mortimer and Holly Walsh for more comic innuendos and unpredictable conundrums. Claudia Winkleman stands in for Rachel Riley on letters-and-numbers duty, while Isy Suttie is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent is in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton catches up with Graham and Nicky, first featured in 2017, who have finally finished their ambitious contemporary home set in the Devon countryside - six years after starting

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Peter Maddision meets Simon and Lauren, who want to convert a tiny 150-year-old church in Hawkesbury, New South Wales, into their family home. Will they succeed in creating a modern house while honouring the history of the church?

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Europe's biggest brewery - Heineken in the Netherlands - on a mission to explain the difference between lager and ale. His journey takes a surprising twist when he comes face to face with the mother of all lagers. Kate Quilton sets Matt Tebbutt the challenge of making crumpets, and finds out how they get filled with unique holes at the Warburtons factory in Enfield, north London. Matt also heads for snowy Canada to discover why maple syrup is so expensive, and finds out that maple syrup robberies are a big concern to the industry

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: In this bite-sized episode, Kirstie Allsopp plans to surprise her guests with two main courses - roast beef with mulled wine gravy, and masala cauliflower with coconut stuffing for the vegetarians

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leyla and Will Moore from Leeds both have hectic working lives, but now the five kids they have between them are grown up, they're ready to slow down a little and buy their very own place in the sun. With their budget of £350,000 Scarlette Douglas shows them five stunning villas on the Algarve in Portugal

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The duo are in Hay-on-Wye and Bedford, where Henry Cole restores a bespoke workbench and Simon O'Brien ponders the possibilities of some discarded planks of wood

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien restores an enamel roll-top bath and builds a den out of old doors. Henry Cole makes a wall mounted safe from a jerry can and lovingly restores a cheese-making trough

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers are on the rock in Ireland, searching for the beneficiaries to the estate of a Limerick-born man. Another case reveals the compulsive hoarding habits of a car enthusiast, and uncovers a potentially highly valuable collection of Dinky toys. Meanwhile, the work of the team brings about an emotional family reunion

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: The owners of a vineyard open a pop-up restaurant, but there are some last-minute nerves, while two B&B proprietors host an unusual event in a bid to boost takings. In Spain, a wannabe fishing captain has to learn the ropes

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Rob and Jo Smith's dog-friendly B&B in Hope Mountain, north Wales. Eyebrows are raised when self-styled 'queens of clean' Steffi Stephenson and Sarah Banks find evidence of their pet hate. During an afternoon making jam, identical twins Fernando and Emilio Tundidor reveal a competitive streak. At breakfast, Denise and Alan Newman are surprisingly demanding

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At the Beaumont Hotel in Louth, Lincolnshire, two guests are damning about the breakfast quality, so it remains to be seen how managers Steffi Stevenson and Sarah Banks will react

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Rock House Hotel in Lynmouth, Devon, where owner Emilio Tundidor is being ably assisted by his identical twin brother Fernando

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Troy House in Painswick, Gloucestershire, where owners Alan and Denise Newman hope the guests will love their rooms, but Emilio and Fernando are on the warpath

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day in the competition sees the B&B owners meet up for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate detectives are on the road in Southampton as they try to track down multiple beneficiaries to the estate of a local market trader worth more than £100,000. Meanwhile, another firm's investigation reveals a family's historical links to the beginnings of professional sport

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Tortoises Burt and Terrance become rivals in love when they pursue a breeding female. Meanwhile, six-year-old okapi K'Tusha nears the end of her first pregnancy, and keepers hope that her baby will help to conserve this highly endangered species, and Asian elephant bull Aung-Bo senses that the three-day window for mating is about to begin

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick visits Stephanie to check out the new boiler for her mum's apartment - but it's bad news and mum Isobel is not happy. Justin and Annabelle must get busy to complete rooms in time for a visit from Justin's 95-year-old grandmother. Jayne and Steve battle with a giant four poster bed for the master en suite bedroom, but with a little help from some friends, manage to complete another room

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Simon and Jasmine Dale take on the challenging task of building a 21st-century, low-impact three-bedroom family home, starting the build with only £500 in the bank. As part of a pioneering, government-backed, sustainable village called Lammas, the couple must adhere to their fierce planning conditions of self-sufficiency or risk losing everything

programme.title: Coroner
programme.desc: Jenny is on the chase to stop a killer as they leave a bloody trail across the city. The stakes are even higher when she realises her son has been in contact with the mass murderer. Canadian crime drama, starring Serinda Swan and Roger Cross

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Glyn, 53, is brought in by ambulance after a work-related accident on a building site, and in his hour of need he turns to his lifelong friend Barrie. Eighteen-month-old Zemirah's parents are concerned with her diarrhoea and vomiting and 93-year-old John is admitted after falling at home, but also has a severe case of sepsis

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson takes on guest captain Johnny Vegas in another round of words-and-numbers chaos. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Peter and Julia Andrews from Hull love Fuerteventura in the Canary Islands and want to buy a holiday home there, which their whole family can enjoy. Armed with a budget of £60,000, Sara Damergi scours the island for five perfect lock-up-and-leave properties, but will any of them make the grade?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Bedfordshire couple Dean and Karen Dhinsa find a rural retreat in southern Tenerife. The pair dream of spending their retirement in a sunny climate, and are looking for a home within easy reach of the island's beaches, complete with a cave to transform into a cinema, all on a budget of £180,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business manager Ross Chapman hosts the first dinner party in west Lancashire, but encounters a string of culinary disasters while preparing his fish-themed menu. However, he still finds time for a manicure and bubble bath before the meal, and it is the behaviour of one of his guests, rather than his burnt tart, that causes the most embarrassment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Single mother Lindsay Pulford hosts the second party in west Lancashire, hoping to impress her fellow diners with a Caribbean-themed night. However, as soon as the guests arrive, they begin to regale her with reminders of her antics the previous evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: History student and part-time bartender Chris Mosey hosts the third dinner party in west Lancashire. He is confident about his cooking skills and has designed a menu that includes blue cheesecake and Scouse tapas

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cleaner Louise Dee hosts the penultimate dinner party in west Lancashire and provides her guests with a Spanish-inspired menu and an 'old skool rave' before her rivals give their thoughts on the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Medical photographer Lorraine Rimmer hosts the final dinner party in west Lancashire, and hopes to impress her guests with a menu consisting of authentic Spanish cuisine, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Babylon in New York, where the peace of Long Island is regularly shattered by the volatile Pellegrino family, proprietors of Peter's Italian Restaurant. Gordon finds owner Tina's work to save the eatery from oblivion is frequently ruined by the behaviour of her brother, a tyrannical front-of-house manager whose violent temper constantly undermines staff morale

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge return to help more British people making French castles their home or running businesses from them. Clive and Karen and their two children are preparing for the wedding season at their chateau in the Dordogne Valley, mucking in together to renovate the pool house

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: After enjoying many holidays together on Tenerife, Terry and Jen wish to celebrate their recent engagement by buying their own holiday home on the south of the island. To help them fulfil their dream, Jonnie Irwin hunts out five options for their £150,000 budget for the pair to consider

programme.title: Johnny Vegas: Carry on Glamping
programme.desc: After two gruelling years during which Johnny Vegas has seen his plans for his glampsite hit by every problem imaginable, he is finally ready for the grand unveiling. Unfortunately, it's in front of his harshest critics - his family and friends. With the final vehicles arriving, there's time for Johnny to deceive his assistant Bev one more time, before he presents her with the 1950s camper van he bought and restored as a gift. As last-minute preparations on the site continue, Johnny inspects the renovated fire truck which quickly takes a wrong turn as he manages to get stuck on the roof, and things get worse from there. As he and Bev prepare for the arrival of the much-loved Maltese bus that started the whole adventure, disaster strikes one final time

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with three house-hunters with two very different needs, but one shared goal. In 2018, schoolteacher Katy, her comedian husband Charlie, baby daughter Lola, and pet pooch Harper were on the hunt for their first family home in Brighton. Having moved in with Katy's mum to save for a deposit, they had not only grown used to home comforts, but also the vibrant village atmosphere of pricey Fiveways - an area where their property dreams didn't match their budget. With Phil's help they widened the net, viewing four fantastic finds in and around Brighton. Two years later, Phil's back to see whether life on the coast has been plain sailing. And in 2019, Kirstie was scouring east London with 'granny on the go' Janet. Having been diagnosed with a degenerative back condition, Janet was desperate to ditch her lift-less, third storey flat in exchange for a ground-floor forever home. The tricky east London property market was proving tough to navigate though, and Kirstie soon f

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Junior doctor Silas works his first ever shift in resus, and is part of the team brought in to treat a biker who is rushed to A&E after riding into a lamppost. A two-year-old boy is treated for injuries resulting from a fall, and his mother shares the story of how her eldest son was recently attacked by a gang

programme.title: Sicario 2: Soldado (2018)
programme.desc: The drug war on the US-Mexico border has escalated as the cartels have begun trafficking terrorists across the US border. Federal agent Matt Graver re-teams with operative Alejandro Gillick to fight the enemy forces. Thriller sequel, starring Josh Brolin, Benicio Del Toro and Isabela Moner

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A look back at the times when what started as great chemistry in the studio ended in dating disaster, reliving memorable arguments and cringeworthy moments, including bisexual Leah from the third series, who brought her pet dog Kush to the studio to help her pick her partner. There is also a reunion between Cathy from Hertfordshire and her date Andy

programme.title: Catching Paedophiles: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Film exploring the challenges of investigating and prosecuting child sexual abuse, and how to manage predators when they've been caught. Detective Claire Lyons, who works for Hampshire Constabulary's Internet Child Abuse Team, has to prove that her suspicions are right about a man who has been uploading indecent images of children - and not risk any mistakes that would lead to the suspect walking free and being able to offend again

programme.title: The Year Britain Stopped
programme.desc: Documentary examining personal stories of Britain during lockdown. The programme includes an interview with the nurse who treated Boris Johnson in intensive care, and examines the news reports written in the event of his death. Other stories include the scientists and frontline workers striving to control the crisis, and a single mother whose son went missing during the first lockdown

programme.title: 21 Day Body Turnaround with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: The journalist and doctor asks five volunteers to put their lives in his hands as he attempts to turn their health around in just 21 days. Initial testing reveals all of them to likely be at risk from debilitating conditions such as diabetes, high blood pressure, heart disease, chronic inflammation and stress. Most have the aerobic fitness age of someone at least 20 years older. In the first episode, Michael investigates their digestive health and starts them out on a new training plan in conjunction with GP and fitness trainer Dr Folusha Oluwajana

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Horse-rescue boss Jill rushes to the aid of an animal abandoned at a roadside. Young couple Nicole and Aaron plan to buy and refurbish a campervan so they can travel the world putting on fitness boot camps. Former call-centre employee Courtney and her boyfriend Michael get the chance to run their own bar, although their boss is soon piling on the pressure to get it open as soon as possible

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: Swindon control springs into action when an unexploded Second World War bomb is found near the line in Teignmouth, transport police seek a word with a man who jumped onto the track to retrieve something he dropped, and team leader Martyn reveals the high cost of cleaning up graffiti

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The officers deal with a number of uninsured drivers, including one who leads them on a 35-minute chase and another who flees the scene of a rush-hour crash, earning himself a full-scale investigation for his trouble. Then in Bradford, a crackdown on road offences leads to the officers nabbing another insurance avoider, but tensions run high as a result

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: It is estimated that more than a million vehicles in Britain are fitted with cloned number plates as criminals who switch them to pass by police cameras undetected. On the outskirts of Bradford, a suspected stolen car using cloned plates crashes after running a red light, leaving the occupants of another car with serious injuries, leaving officers to deal with the aftermath, while a manhunt is launched for the offenders

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Justin Moffitt and Paul Faulkner chase down a gang of suspected car thieves, while it takes seven officers to stop a violent thief who tries to sink his teeth into them. Elsewhere, a drug raid turns life-threatening, and dog-handler Jimmy Grieves tries to find out what has happened to a man with a bloodied face

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A special edition looking at the police dog teams in the Cleveland and Durham specialist operations unit. Cameras observe the highly trained animals and their handlers in training and in action as the documentary reveals the endearing bonds the hounds develop with their masters. Drawing on new stories as well as archive footage, this programme showcases the vital role the dog unit plays in collaring criminals within the region

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Pursued by a helicopter and a team of armed response vehicles, two men armed with machetes and a sawn-off shotgun make a dramatic escape on a motorbike. Meanwhile, officers Clarkie and Nick take two dangerous boy racers off the road, and a high-speed pursuit of alleged burglars turns into a race on foot

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall tries to help the owners of Bella the collie in Sheffield, whose aggression has become so extreme that people can no longer visit the house and the family cannot take the pet out in public. Graeme also meets Toby, a stroppy basset hound that enjoys sitting on the kitchen counter, and Dave, the French bulldog with a penchant for eating its own droppings

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Though determined to meet with Brent, Harlow is unable to slip away thanks to Mackenzie and Terese's well-intentioned efforts. Mackenzie and Karl keep a close eye on Toadie

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Roo learns a martial has dropped out of the surf competition. Amber is nervous about her relationship with Dean

programme.title: Sinkholes: Buried Underground
programme.desc: As the pipes, tunnels and waterways that lie beneath the world's cities start to crumble, sinkholes are appearing with no warning. Footage from instances around the world reveal how once-stable urban areas are sinking right in front of people's eyes

programme.title: Eaten By an Escalator
programme.desc: Documentary scrutinising people's darkest fears surrounding escalators by take a look at calamities involving the moving staircases and hearing from those who have been victims of accidents Plus, the programme debunks some myths and assesses the safety of these machines with industry experts in an attempt to allay widespread fears surrounding the dangers of escalators

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Shannon Matthews: What Happened Next
programme.desc: The disappearance of Shannon Matthews was a story that gripped and then appalled Britain. Nine years on, this documentary examines her kidnapping and why people close to the case believe the police should reopen their investigation. Featuring the insight of some of those closest to the case, the programme charts the impact on an innocent girl caught in the lies and greed of those who were supposed to be caring for her

programme.title: My Lover My Killer
programme.desc: Real life cases of people murdered by their own partners, beginning with a controlling taxi driver who reacted violently at the prospect of his relationship ending

programme.title: Murdered By
programme.desc: Documentary telling the stories of three women who have murdered their partners, featuring contributions from families, police officers, journalists and experts

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.desc: The documentary looks at a hidden world of pensioners who are selling sex when most people of their age are planning their funerals. Those featured include Norm, an 85-year-old former priest now enjoying a new career as a porn star, and 72-year-old transgender escort Pippa Jane

programme.title: Robbing Your Relatives
programme.desc: Return of the documentary taking a look at what can happen when families fall out over money. The first episode examines the case of a teenager cheated out of her grandfather's inheritance by her own dad and stepmother. The pair forged signatures and lied to solicitors and banks to steal the money, then frittered it away on luxuries and paying off their own debts. There is also the story of a pair of identical twins who fell out over a £55,000 loan, and a man who was alleged to have robbed his mother's pension and life savings, but took his own life before justice was done

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall checks up on a 13 stone Newfoundland, whose health is in danger due to his weight - but who refuses to exercise unless he has been bribed with treats. Other pets on his list are a Great Dane with a social media following who makes his owners' lives unbearable and a dog so spoiled she even has her own car, but who has a serious dislike of children

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Well-to-do teens are taught the true value of money by swapping their first-class globetrotting getaways for micro-budget breaks in the UK. Mel is accustomed to at least three 5-star holidays a year, all paid for by her family. Now she'll be ditching her Louboutins for a pair of wellies on a camping holiday with experienced budgeteers Pam and Graham, their 23-year-old daughter Anne-Marie and three-year-old grandson Jayden from Walsall

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Christian and Mandy, the organisers of the annual Pride festival, are 4,000 euros short of the 18,000 required to stage the weekend-long party - and if that were not bad enough, the costumes are seven sizes too big. With two weeks left, can the duo save the day? Cameras also follow bar owner Cath as she prepares to host a hen party for 14 excited Northern Irish women and Leeds lad Peter, who publishes a free pocket guide to the Costa del Sol

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: A look at how the festive period affects regular operations at the station, with staff calling in the help of some reindeer and a white owl to get passengers in the mood of the season. Up the line, engineers are working on one of the most important projects of this year's Christmas works - laying a whole new track system outside Oxford Station. Although there is no regular train service at Paddington, staff still need to be on duty on Christmas Day, but they take advantage of the lack of customers by having a rare sit-down lunch together

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: The monumental task of cleaning the home of Andrew in Norfolk, who has filled his cluttered home with toys, models and computers. There are cat faeces throughout, and an infestation of bugs in the kitchen

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The police in Bradford pursue a team of suspected car thieves, travelling at speeds of 80mph. North Yorkshire's Road Crime Team track down a stolen Land Rover Defender, but when a suspect makes a run for it into nearby woods, the officers are forced to give chase with nothing but a torch to help them catch their man

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: On the A1 near Leeds, an intoxicated driver rams a police car before heading the wrong way down the dual carriageway and the cops instigate a risky containment manoeuvre to bring him to a standstill. In Halifax, a criminal's wellbeing becomes officers' primary concern after they discover a trail of blood at the scene of an apparent drink-related crash

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Ben chases after a teenage driver in a stolen car at speeds of more than 100mph and while the pursuit is brought to an end by a successful stinger trap, there is a shocking surprise in store. Mick and the Operational Support Unit carry out a raid on a house and uncover a cannabis farm in the loft, while Gav apprehends a motorcyclist risking his and other road users' lives with his reckless riding

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers pursue a driver who flees the scene of a road accident in a decommissioned ambulance, eventually abandoning the vehicle on a railway line after crashing through level-crossing barriers. Elsewhere, Warren comes under attack from a gang of youths on a garage forecourt, Spenner nicks a runaway driver with the help of a wheelie bin, and Kev is faced with a flaming Mercedes in the middle of rush hour

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: In Huddersfield, officers are in pursuit of a van driver who smashed his van into a parked car before fleeing, while Bob and Dan pepper spray a suspect who is not keen on being handcuffed. Chris and Chris go after a stolen car whose driver gets too close to some railings, and the Operational Support Unit deal with a suspected heroin user carrying a number of bank cards and needles

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall tries to solve more dog behavioural problems, visiting a family in East Sussex struggling with rescue puppy Diego, a Rottweiler-Rhodesian ridgeback cross. In Cambridgeshire, cocker spaniel Doug's relentless thievery is destroying any chance of a peaceful retirement for owners Julie and Mark, while Graeme's third stop is in Derby, where he meets two miniature schnauzers known locally as the Krays

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: After Emmett's move to New Zealand is approved, Aaron and David leave him to make his decision. Toadie confronts Hendrix

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Irene must win over the surf contest's chief sponsor. Leah tracks down Justin, and discovers he has double- dosed on his medication

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall comes to the aid of three generations of the same family whose harmonious existence is being disrupted by a running feud between two of their dogs. Plus, a Border Collie's obsession with mirrors is becoming worrying, and a Chinese Crested will not let any man near his owner

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: Cameras follow events at two West Country holiday camps - Tencreek in Looe, Cornwall, and Holiday Resort Unity near Weston-super-Mare - as they open their doors for the first time after the first Covid-19 lockdown. After an uncertain start to the season, both camps plan to be back with a bang as they promise a summer holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan tackle a house in Neath, south Wales, where single father Barry has let his home become increasingly dirty and disorganised. Barry used to lead an active life, but at the age of 32, Barry suffered a stroke, and now cleaning has become an impossible job, so the pair quickly get to work, and set about scrubbing, shining and sorting to make Barry's home a fit and safe place for him and his daughter

programme.title: Robbing Your Relatives
programme.desc: The case of a man who repeatedly lied and stole from the woman he claimed to love, racking up thousands of pounds of debt by stealing her credit cards and inventing a fantasy life. This episode also examines the case of a family member who allegedly conned an elderly relative out of her life savings

programme.title: Adults Only
programme.desc: A revealing insight into some couples who are keen to spice up their sex lives by seeking another person to join them in a sexual relationship

programme.title: The Lesbian Guide to Straight Sex
programme.desc: A team of gay women overhaul the sex lives of British hetero couples, beginning with Gateshead duo Mollie, 48, and 50-year-old Ian

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The psychology of Charles Manson, an American cult leader whose followers murdered seven people in their California homes over two nights in August 1969. Detectives, lawyers and psychiatrists analyse what prompted the crimes, and examine how Manson was able to persuade his acolytes to take the lives of innocent people

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Stuart and Francis from Buckinghamshire trade their luxury getaway for a basic campsite on the shores of Ullswater in Cumbria's Lake District. Meanwhile, the Warriners from Scunthorpe get a taste of the good life as they spend a week at an exclusive chateau near Calais, France - complete with chef, swimming pool, beauty salon and luxury yacht

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Mandy and Christian's Pride parade finally arrives, but what begins as a stressful day only gets worse when the generator powering the speakers packs up. Can the duo turn things around or will the the revellers be expected to dance to a silent soundtrack? Meanwhile, cockney limo driver Johnny Diamond books two big jobs on the same night, and Bury couple Andy and Sue settle in to their static caravan in the Spanish countryside

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: Sunday's services grind to a halt when the 11.57 service to Penzance derails as it is departing, while a knife-carrying passenger causes concern in Bristol. Elsewhere, a team of specialists clean the mats laid down to protect the tracks from the actions of passengers ignoring the signs advising them not to flush onboard toilets while the trains are in the station

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes are tackled in the space of just three days

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Highlights of the documentary giving an insight into the working life of officers patrolling the nation's roads as they combine modern technology and old-fashioned methods to bring criminals to justice. Officers pursue a drug runner down one of the UK's busiest motorways, and a drug deal results in a white-knuckle race through Bradford's back streets

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed night-time pursuit in Bradford heightens tensions in the local community, with outnumbered cops facing the prospect of a potential riot. An apparently routine stop takes a serious turn as the vehicle pulled over is thought to contain a firearm and the unarmed officers must hold their nerve as they wait for a specialist team to join them. Jamie Theakston narrates

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The police interception unit attempt to stop a dangerous driver, resulting in multiple cars and a helicopter being called into action. Dog handler Duncan assists armed response officers in Leeds city centre in the early hours following reports of a man carrying a pistol, while in Wakefield, a repeat offender who has been caught drink driving in the past thinks he knows how to beat the system

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dan and Tom have their hands full with a driver who is four times over the limit and still refuses to come quietly even when he's bundled into the back of the police car. Sophie and Adie stop a carload of lads at five in the morning and the driver is over the limit, but it's what's down his trousers that is more of a concern

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A gang of burglars breaks into a house and takes the keys to luxury cars. After the thieves flee in three stolen vehicles, multiple teams hunt them down with the police chopper. The first burglar is caught after a lengthy pursuit of a stolen Mercedes, which he abandons before running straight into the path of waiting officers. Once the occupants of a second stolen Merc are apprehended by the chopper team, Ben and Warren go after the third vehicle - which they are stunned to witness burst into flames

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Master dog trainer Graeme Hall finds long lasting solutions for dogs with problems. They include Butty, who is bullying the female members of his household, and Pixie, who howls like a banshee the moment she sees another dog. Cameras also follow Lucy, who will stay in the park for hours to raid picnics

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Jane returns from Mildura to find tension between Chloe, Nicolette, Aaron and David. Paul grows increasingly suspicious of Harlow's behaviour

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ziggy deflects Tane's question about why she broke up with Dean. A withdrawn Jasmine is out in public for the first time in days

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits by the Sea
programme.desc: In Scarborough, there's a disaster for Danny and boss Rudy at their interactive horror house on the front when the machine that powers the scares breaks down, while Ann reveals the secrets of selling souvenirs in Blackpool. Skegness B&B owners Lorraine and Neville decide whether to sell their business and enjoy retirement

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: One of the department's new junior doctors treats a man with a suspected case of sepsis, that has been triggered by the tracheostomy tube he relies on to breathe. An 84-year-old woman is brought in by ambulance after falling down a flight of stairs and undergoes multiple x-rays to check for broken bones, while a 12-month-old baby needs treatment after having a fit

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A man with a torn aorta, the main artery in the body, needs urgent medical attention to prevent catastrophic internal bleeding. Meanwhile, a patient is flown into the hospital by helicopter after being involved in a major car accident, and another man is brought in and treated after falling through a skylight in a roof

programme.title: Inferno (2016)
programme.desc: Following his life-or-death missions in The Da Vinci Code, and Angels and Demons, long suffering expert Robert Langdon awakes with amnesia in an Italian hospital, and is soon on the run with a beautiful doctor. Racing to stop a devastating virus, the symbologist suffers shocking visions as an assassin closes in. Director Ron Howard's conversion of the Dan Brown thriller, starring Tom Hanks, Felicity Jones and Irrfan Khan

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A former soldier comes to trial for the murder of a Yemeni immigrant he suspected of being a terrorist. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal shooting of two professors, which occurred soon after one of the academics campaigned against the treatment of women in the Middle East. Their inquiries lead them to a Muslim with strong beliefs - and an extreme dislike of females. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pizza delivery man is murdered, causing trouble when the two suspects point the finger at the other. Though one of the pair is taped admitting to the crime, his Catholic priest uncle forbids the team from violating the sanctity of the Confessional. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-school student is killed by a hit-and-run driver, with tyre marks at the scene indicating it was deliberate. The case is complicated when the chief suspect is murdered by his mother. Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bookmaker is arrested on suspicion of murdering his business partner - and his attorney puts together an unconventional case that effectively turns the whole trial into a political statement. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Baltimore detectives Munch and Falsone head for pastures new, travelling to New York to aid the investigation into the death of a teenage model, while McCoy has a fight on his hands with the attorney representing the victim's parents. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Richard Belzer and Jon Seda, with Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team's old enemy Ari Haswari returns, working on behalf of a secretive terrorist faction. Gibbs is distressed to learn he is the next target, but does not realise the killer has another more complex scheme in mind. Guest starring Rudolf Martin, with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. The team reels in the wake of the terrorist attack, but tries to avenge Kate's death by collecting as much information as possible on Ari before he does any more damage. Meanwhile, Gibbs learns one of his old flames has been named as the new NCIS director

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gibbs continues to blame himself for Kate's death, and enlists Jenny's help to track down Ari - but they are nearly killed in a shoot-out. Just when all seems lost, however, Ziva is able to point the investigation in the right direction. Starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A police officer is framed for a triple homicide by a greedy woman involved in a bitter divorce settlement who has her sights set on revenge. It emerges she took advantage of his sleepwalking - a habit that began after he killed a man in self-defence a year earlier. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate when an outbreak of arson attacks on churches culminates in the death of a St Gerald's employee. The trail soon leads to a man who donated $100,000 for restoration work on the building. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate a troubled teenager after his parents are found murdered in their suburban home. They are convinced the youngster is innocent - even though he confesses to the crime. Meanwhile, Deakins spends his last two weeks on the job preparing for his future

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is seriously wounded in a shooting. While the team hunts down the gunman in a bid to bring him to justice, the veteran detective has a vision of his late wife Claire (Jaime Ray Newman) and agonises over whether he wants to fight for life or be reunited with her in death. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate when an undercover secret service agent is found murdered in her home. Their first suspect is the victim's husband, but complications quickly arise when her work comes under the microscope, and her husband's nefarious activities for a corrupt Congressman are uncovered. US crime drama, starring Chris Noth and Annabella Sciorra

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A young teacher faces prosecution for falsifying test results, and she appeals to Jason for legal aid, claiming she only changed the score to help a student reach their potential

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a female rock singer, who apparently died of an overdose of cocaine and heroin. However, their inquiry is hampered by the appearance of a retired officer using unorthodox research tactics to find out the truth. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Investigations into a stolen credit card lead Briscoe and Curtis to a pair of teenage lovers who may have killed their newborn son and disposed of the body. The couple strenuously deny any wrongdoing - but the discovery of a decomposing baby's finger adds weight to the evidence against them. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A notorious drug dealer is murdered and suspicion falls on two possible culprits - a priest with a reputation as a vigilante, and the father of a teenager who died of an overdose. Briscoe and Green attempt to discover whether either of them took the law into his own hands. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A witness to a jewellery store robbery that went tragically wrong fails to appear in court. McCoy suspects foul play - until it transpires the man has been on the run for the past 20 years. Police drama, guest starring Mandy Patinkin of Criminal Minds fame, with Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The parents of a baby given up for adoption could provide a clue to the death of a new mother - but the investigation also turns up long-buried family secrets. The detectives are forced to consider the possibility that racial prejudice played a part in the case

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs tries to extract information from a convict on death row about where he hid the bodies of his victims. However, the killer proves reluctant to confess, forcing the team to solve the case by unconventional means. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents set out to find the stolen body of a Civil War general, but Dr Elaine Burns is shocked to discover the entombed corpse of a Marine sergeant instead, eventually reaching the conclusion he was buried alive. Meanwhile, Mossad agent Ziva David returns as a replacement for Kate, much to Gibbs's displeasure. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine who appears to have been leading a double life is shot dead. As the investigation continues, however, the team uncovers a case of identity theft - together with a tangled motive involving a mysterious package and a wronged wife. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: Syd, McKenna and the team work together as they race against time to save one of their own, finally coming face to face with their greatest enemy

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: An investigation is launched into the death of a former ambassador's daughter and another murder carried out in the same vein. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan is joined by new partner Megan Wheeler to examine the murder of a womanising doctor, who died when his vintage motorbike was tampered with. Starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson, with Anne Dudek and Anton Yelchin

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate the murder of a teenage violinist who has been pushed to her death at a prestigious concert hall. Julian Sands and Alice Krige guest star

Police drama, guest starring Lucie Arnaz, with Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

programme.desc: The home potters are tested on the art of Japanese-style ceramics. For the main challenge, they throw a sake set, consisting of one bottle and six identical cups. The exciting part, however, comes during the firing, when they use a risky 16th-century method in which they pull their burning pieces out of the kiln and plunge them into a bin full of combustible materials. For the spot test, they must pierce and carve an intricate design into a lantern using a technique known as the 'devil's work', and the throw down sees them back at the wheel, making as many rice bowls as they can in 15 minutes

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.desc: Paul and his family head for court to face the accusers and await the verdict. Paul has his own ideas about how to proceed, and in defiance of Jerome's recommendations, is determined to take the witness stand himself and give his side of the story. However, it seems that Karl may hold the key to determining the outcome of the trial. Dee starts to suspect that Marie's faith in her husband's innocence may be wavering and that even if he is innocent, their marriage may not survive. Robbie Coltrane and Julie Walters star in the final episode of the drama

programme.title: Robert the Bruce (2019)
programme.desc: Following the execution of William Wallace, Robert the Bruce has suffered a number of losses. Ex-communicated and with a large bounty on his head, the wounded, hunted warrior seeks refuge with a single mother and her family, and reflects on the choices he must make if he wishes to lead Scotland to victory. Drama, starring Angus Macfadyen, Jared Harris, Anna Hutchison and Patrick Fugit

programme.title: Elvis and Anabelle (2007)
programme.desc: A contestant drops dead in the middle of a beauty pageant, but miraculously returns to life on the mortician's slab. She forms an immediate bond with the jaded young man who was about to embalm her, and together they set off to pursue a new life away from their domineering parents. Romantic fantasy, starring Max Minghella and Blake Lively

programme.title: Kelly Hoppen Home Design
programme.desc: Kelly Hoppen is a renowned interior designer and now she's created a range just for QVC! It includes fine linens, cushions and accent pieces featuring her signature style

programme.title: Seasalt Fashion
programme.desc: Founded in Penzance, Cornwall in 1981, Seasalt offer high quality, functional and timelessly styling clothing to complement your wardrobe throughout the year

programme.title: Moda In Pelle

programme.title: Premier Tanzanite

programme.title: Live UEFA Europa League
programme.desc: Villarreal v Manchester United (Kick-off 8.00pm). All the action from the final, which comes from Stadion Miejski in Gdansk, Poland. Villarreal are appearing in a European final for the first time in their history, having overcome Arsenal 2-1 on aggregate in the semi-finals after previously eliminating Red Bull Salzburg, Dynamo Kiev and Dinamo Zagreb in the knockout stages. United have already beaten two Spanish outfits in Real Sociedad and Granada, as well as Italian sides AC Milan and AS Roma, and are now looking to lift this trophy for the second time, having prevailed against Ajax in the 2017 final
